title: Founder OS HQ - Companies
description: Central CRM hub for all client/company records. Enhanced with P10 Client Health Dashboard scoring properties and P20 Client Context Loader dossier caching. All client-facing databases relate back to this table.

Dossier.description: P20: Cached client context dossier (JSON format)

Dossier Generated At.description: P20: When dossier was last generated

Dossier Stale.description: P20: Whether dossier needs refresh (24h TTL)

Last Scanned.description: P10: When health score was last calculated (24h cache TTL)

notes: Central hub of the Founder OS HQ workspace. All client-facing databases (Tasks, Meetings, Finance, Deliverables, Content, Research) link to Companies via Notion relations. P10 Client Health Dashboard writes health scoring properties directly to this database instead of a standalone Health Scores DB. P20 Client Context Loader writes dossier properties directly here instead of a standalone Client Dossiers DB. Both use 24h TTL caching. Discovery: plugins search for 'Founder OS HQ - Companies' first, then 'Companies'.
